variables.input:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and matchesPhrase(event.type, "Query")
| fields event.type
| dedup  event.type

fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and matchesPhrase(event.type, "Query")
AND isNotNull(user.email)
AND in(event.type,$DataType)
| fields user.email
| dedup user.email

34.title: Query Cost Per Day
34.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and matchesPhrase(event.type, "Query")
AND isNotNull(user.email)
AND in(event.type,$DataType)
and in(user.email,$user)
| fields query_start, event.type, query_id, user.email, billed_bytes, timestamp
| fieldsAdd query_cost = billed_bytes/1024/1024/1024*toDouble($cost)
| makeTimeseries query_cost_sum = sum(query_cost), bins:1
| fieldsAdd temp = if(isNull(query_cost_sum[]), toDouble(0), else:query_cost_sum[])
| fieldsAdd `Cost` = arrayCumulativeSum(temp)
| fieldsRemove temp

36.title: DQL Cost by Data Type Daily
36.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and matchesPhrase(event.type, "Query")
AND isNotNull(user.email)
AND in(event.type,$DataType)
and in(user.email,$user)
| fields query_start, event.type, query_id, user.email, billed_bytes, timestamp
| makeTimeseries query_cost_sum = sum(billed_bytes/1024/1024/1024*toDouble($cost)), by:{event.type}, bins:1
| fieldsAdd temp = if(isNull(query_cost_sum[]), toDouble(0), else:query_cost_sum[])
| fieldsAdd `Cost` = arrayCumulativeSum(temp)
| fieldsRemove temp

37.title: DQL Cost by Data Type
37.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and matchesPhrase(event.type, "Query")
AND isNotNull(user.email)
AND in(event.type,$DataType)
and in(user.email,$user)
| fields query_start, event.type, query_id, user.email, billed_bytes
| summarize bytes = sum(billed_bytes), by:{event.type}
| summarize array = collectArray(record(`event.type`,bytes)),totalBytes=sum(bytes)
| expand array
| fieldsAdd query_totalCost = totalBytes/1024/1024/1024*toDouble($cost), query_cost = array[bytes]/1024/1024/1024*toDouble($cost)
| fields array[event.type], alias:`Data Type`, round(query_cost, decimals:toLong($decimalPlace)), alias:`Cost`, percentage = (toDouble(query_cost/query_totalCost) * 100)
| sort percentage desc

39.title: Last Month
39.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and matchesPhrase(event.type, "Query")
AND isNotNull(user.email)
AND in(event.type,$DataType)
and in(user.email,$user)
| fields query_start, event.type, query_id, user.email, billed_bytes, timestamp
| makeTimeseries monthly=sum(billed_bytes/1024/1024/1024), interval:31d
| fieldsAdd lastmonth = arrayLast(monthly)

44.title: Last 24h
44.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and matchesPhrase(event.type, "Query")
AND isNotNull(user.email)
AND in(event.type,$DataType)
and in(user.email,$user)
| fields query_start, event.type, query_id, user.email, billed_bytes, timestamp

46.title: Traces - Cost by User
46.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and matchesPhrase(event.type, "Query")
AND matchesPhrase(event.type,"Traces - Query")
AND isNotNull(user.email)
and in(user.email,$user)
| fields query_start, event.type, query_id, user.email, billed_bytes
| fieldsAdd query_cost = billed_bytes/1024/1024/1024*toDouble($cost)
| summarize cost = round((sum(query_cost)), decimals:toLong($decimalPlace)), count = count(), by:{user.email,event.type}
| sort cost desc
// | fieldsAdd Cost = concat($currency,round(cost, decimals:toLong($decimalPlace))),costAlert = if(cost >= toLong($costAlert),1,else:0)
| fields user.email, cost
// | fields user.email, costAlert, alias:`Cost Alert`,totalCostString, alias: `Total Cost($currency)`, records[type], alias:`Type1`, records[count], alias:`Query Count1`, concat($currency,records[cost]), alias:`Cost ($currency)1`
| limit toLong($limit)

49.title: Total Cost per User
49.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and matchesPhrase(event.type, "Query")
AND isNotNull(user.email)
AND in(event.type,$DataType)
and in(user.email,$user)
| fields query_start, event.type, query_id, user.email, billed_bytes
| fieldsAdd query_cost = billed_bytes/1024/1024/1024*toDouble($cost)
| summarize cost = round((sum(query_cost)), decimals:toLong($decimalPlace)), count = count(), by:{user.email,event.type}
| summarize records = collectArray(record(cost, count, type=event.type)), total = sum(cost), by:{user.email}
| fieldsAdd totalCost =round(total, decimals:toLong($decimalPlace)),
costAlert = if(total >= toLong($costAlert),1,else:0)
| sort totalCost desc
| fields user.email, costAlert, alias:`Cost Alert`,totalCost, alias: `Total Cost`, records[0][type], alias:`Type1`, records[0][count], alias:`Query Count1`, records[0][cost], alias:`Cost 1`,
records[1][type], alias:`Type2`, records[1][count], alias:`Query Count2`, records[1][cost], alias:`Cost 2`,
records[2][type], alias:`Type3`, records[2][count], alias:`Query Count3`, records[2][cost], alias:`Cost 3`
| limit toLong($limit)

52.title: Cost by App
52.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and matchesPhrase(event.type, "Query")
AND isNotNull(user.email)
AND in(event.type,$DataType)
and in(user.email,$user)
| fields query_start, event.type, query_id, user.email, billed_bytes, timestamp, query_string
| fieldsAdd gb = billed_bytes/1024/1024/1024
| fieldsAdd query_cost = gb*toDouble($cost)  
| join [
  fetch dt.system.query_executions
  | filter isNotNull(user.email) 
  AND not(in(bucket, "default_davis_events","dt_system_metrics","default_davis_k8s_ops_events","default_davis_custom_events","default_security_custom_events","default_security_events","default_synthetic_events","default_synthetic_detailed_events","default_selfmon_events")) 
  AND isNotNull(bucket)
  AND bucket != ""
  AND status == "SUCCEEDED"
  AND scanned_bytes > 0
  AND (isNotNull(client.application_context)  or isNotNull(client.internal_service_context))
  and isNotNull(query_id)
  | parse client.source,"LD:link ('?'|EOS)"
  | fieldsAdd client.source = client.source
  // AND isNotNull(client.source)
],
  on: query_id,
  prefix: "executiondata.",
  kind:inner
| fieldsAdd app = if(isNotNull(executiondata.client.application_context)
      ,executiondata.client.application_context
      ,else:executiondata.client.internal_service_context), function = executiondata.client.function_context, link = executiondata.link, source = executiondata.client.source
| summarize  Cost = round((sum(query_cost)), decimals:toLong($decimalPlace)),GiB = round(sum(gb), decimals:toLong($decimalPlace)), executions=count(), by:{app, function, link, source}
| sort Cost desc
| fieldsAdd costAlert = if(Cost >= toDouble($costAlert), 1, else:0)
| fieldsAdd url = if(app == "dynatrace.davis.anomalydetection", concat("[",app,"](https://",$tenant,".apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.davis.anomalydetection/intent/open_anomaly_detector_schema#%7B%22dt.settings.object_id%22%3A%22",source,"%22%2C%22dt.settings.schema_id%22%3A%22builtin%3Adavis.anomaly-detectors%22%7D)"),else:concat("[",app,"]","(",link,")"))

// | fieldsAdd url = concat("[",executiondata.client.source,"](https://",$tenant,".apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.davis.anomalydetection/intent/open_anomaly_detector_schema#%7B%22dt.settings.object_id%22%3A%22",executiondata.client.source,"%22%2C%22dt.settings.schema_id%22%3A%22builtin%3Adavis.anomaly-detectors%22%7D)")
| fields app, url, costAlert, Cost, GiB, executions
| filter GiB > 0
| limit toLong($limit)

53.title: Cost by Dashboard/Notebook
53.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and matchesPhrase(event.type, "Query")
AND isNotNull(user.email)
AND in(event.type,$DataType)
and in(user.email,$user)
| fields query_start, event.type, query_id, user.email, billed_bytes, timestamp, query_string
| fieldsAdd gb = billed_bytes/1024/1024/1024
| fieldsAdd query_cost = gb*toDouble($cost)  
| lookup [
  fetch dt.system.query_executions
  | filter isNotNull(user.email) 
  AND not(in(bucket, "default_davis_events","dt_system_metrics","default_davis_k8s_ops_events","default_davis_custom_events","default_security_custom_events","default_security_events","default_synthetic_events","default_synthetic_detailed_events","default_selfmon_events")) 
  AND isNotNull(bucket)
  AND bucket != ""
  AND status == "SUCCEEDED"
  AND scanned_bytes > 0
  AND isNotNull(client.application_context) AND isNotNull(client.source)
  AND in(client.application_context,"dynatrace.notebooks","dynatrace.dashboards")
],
  sourceField: query_id,
  lookupField: query_id,
  prefix: "executiondata.",
  executionOrder:leftFirst
| sort timestamp desc
| parse executiondata.client.source,"LD '/ui/' LD:type '/' LD:id"
// //| parse client.application_context,"'dynatrace.' LD:type 's'"
| filter isNotNull(id)
// //| fieldsAdd length = stringLength(client.application_context)
| fieldsAdd link = concat("[",executiondata.client.application_context,"]","(https://",executiondata.environment,".apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/",executiondata.client.application_context,"/",type,"/",id,")")
// // | fieldsRemove scanned_bytes
| summarize  Cost = round((sum(query_cost)), decimals:toLong($decimalPlace)),GiB = round(sum(gb), decimals:toLong($decimalPlace)), by:{executiondata.client.application_context, id, link}
| fieldsAdd costAlert = if(Cost >= toDouble($costAlert), 1, else:0)
| filterOut Cost <= 0
| sort Cost desc
| fields id, link, costAlert, Cost, GiB
| limit toLong($limit)

54.title: Cost by Bucket
54.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and matchesPhrase(event.type, "Query")
AND isNotNull(user.email)
AND in(event.type,$DataType)
and in(user.email,$user)
| fields query_start, event.type, query_id, user.email, billed_bytes, timestamp, query_string
| fieldsAdd gb = billed_bytes/1024/1024/1024
| fieldsAdd query_cost = gb*toDouble($cost)  
| lookup [
  fetch dt.system.query_executions
  | filter isNotNull(user.email) 
  and not(in(bucket, "default_davis_events","dt_system_metrics","default_davis_k8s_ops_events","default_davis_custom_events","default_security_custom_events","default_security_events","default_synthetic_events","default_synthetic_detailed_events","default_selfmon_events")) 
  and isNotNull(bucket)
  and bucket != ""
  and status == "SUCCEEDED"
  and scanned_bytes > 0
],
  sourceField: query_id,
  lookupField: query_id,
  prefix: "executiondata.",
  executionOrder:leftFirst
| sort timestamp desc
| summarize Cost = round((sum(query_cost)), decimals:toLong($decimalPlace)), GiB = round(sum(gb), decimals:toLong($decimalPlace)),executions = count(), by: {bucket = executiondata.bucket}
| sort Cost desc
| fieldsAdd costAlert = if(Cost >= toDouble($costAlert), 1, else:0)
| fields bucket, costAlert, Cost, GiB, executions
| filter GiB > 0
| limit toLong($limit)

56.title: AVG Cost & GB per Execution (Optimization Opportunity)
56.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and matchesPhrase(event.type, "Query")
AND isNotNull(user.email)
AND in(event.type,$DataType)
and in(user.email,$user)
| fields query_start, event.type, query_id, user.email, billed_bytes
| fieldsAdd gb = billed_bytes/1024/1024/1024
| fieldsAdd query_cost = gb*toDouble($cost)
| summarize cost = round((sum(query_cost)), decimals:toLong($decimalPlace)), count = count(), gb = sum(gb), by:{user.email}  
| fieldsAdd costPerExecutionAvg = cost/count, gbPerExecutionAvg = gb/count
| sort costPerExecutionAvg desc
| fieldsAdd costAvgPerExecution = if(costPerExecutionAvg >= toDouble($costAvgExecutionAlert), 1, else:0)
| fields user.email, costAvgPerExecution, cost = round(costPerExecutionAvg,decimals:toLong($decimalPlace)), GiB = round(gbPerExecutionAvg, decimals:toLong($decimalPlace))
| filter GiB > 0
| limit toLong($limit)

57.title: Un-optimized DQL
57.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and matchesPhrase(event.type, "Query")
AND isNotNull(user.email)
AND in(event.type,$DataType)
and in(user.email,$user)
| fields query_start, event.type, query_id, user.email, billed_bytes, timestamp, query_string
| fieldsAdd gb = billed_bytes/1024/1024/1024
| fieldsAdd query_cost = gb*toDouble($cost)  
| lookup [
  fetch dt.system.query_executions
  | filter isNotNull(user.email) 
  and not(in(bucket, "default_davis_events","dt_system_metrics","default_davis_k8s_ops_events","default_davis_custom_events","default_security_custom_events","default_security_events","default_synthetic_events","default_synthetic_detailed_events","default_selfmon_events")) 
  and isNotNull(bucket)
  and bucket != ""
  and status == "SUCCEEDED"
  and scanned_bytes > 0
  and isNotNull(query_string)
  | filterOut (contains(query_string, "filter") AND matchesRegex(query_string,"\\\\w+\\\\s*==\\\\s*\\\"*\\\""))
  OR not(contains(query,"scanLimitGBytes:-1")) 
  OR contains(query_string,"filterOut")
  OR contains(query_string,"from:")
  OR contains(query_string, "samplingRatio")
  OR contains(query_string, "experimentalFieldsSummary")
  OR contains(query_string, "limit")
],
  sourceField: query_id,
  lookupField: query_id,
  prefix: "executiondata.",
  executionOrder:leftFirst
| sort timestamp desc
| summarize Cost = round((sum(query_cost)), decimals:toLong($decimalPlace)), GiB = round(sum(gb), decimals:toLong($decimalPlace)),executions = count(), by: {query = executiondata.query_string}
| filter isNotNull(query)
| sort Cost desc
| fieldsAdd costAlert = if(Cost >= toDouble($costAlert), 1, else:0)
| fields query, costAlert, Cost, GiB, executions
| filter GiB > 0
| limit toLong($limit)

58.title: Most Expensive Queries
58.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and matchesPhrase(event.type, "Query")
AND isNotNull(user.email)
AND in(event.type,$DataType)
and in(user.email,$user)
| fields query_start, event.type, query_id, user.email, billed_bytes, timestamp, query_string
| fieldsAdd gb = billed_bytes/1024/1024/1024
| fieldsAdd query_cost = gb*toDouble($cost)  
| lookup [
  fetch dt.system.query_executions
  | filter isNotNull(user.email) 
  and not(in(bucket, "default_davis_events","dt_system_metrics","default_davis_k8s_ops_events","default_davis_custom_events","default_security_custom_events","default_security_events","default_synthetic_events","default_synthetic_detailed_events","default_selfmon_events")) 
  and isNotNull(bucket)
  and bucket != ""
  and status == "SUCCEEDED"
  and scanned_bytes > 0
  and isNotNull(query_string)
  and query_string != ""
],
  sourceField: query_id,
  lookupField: query_id,
  prefix: "executiondata.",
  executionOrder:leftFirst
| sort timestamp desc
| summarize Cost = round((sum(query_cost)), decimals:toLong($decimalPlace)), GiB = round(sum(gb), decimals:toLong($decimalPlace)),executions = count(), by: {query = executiondata.query_string}
| sort Cost desc
| fieldsAdd costAlert = if(Cost >= toDouble($costAlert), 1, else:0)
| fields query, costAlert, Cost, GiB, executions
| filter GiB > 0
| limit toLong($limit)

59.content:
#### version 2.0.0 changelog:
###### - Overall Queries
- Adapted the fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and matchesPhrase(event.type, "Query") model for getting accurate events that were billing events.

#### version 1.0.8 changelog:
###### - User Email Resolution
- fixed user id showing instead of user email.
###### - DQL by dashboard/notebook
- visualize which dashboards are most costly

#### version 1.0.7 changelog:
###### - Bucket Usage Distribution
- analysis on queries which filter on different buckets/no buckets
###### - Added variables
- credId - id of the credential, used to retrieve OAuth client id, secret from credential vault.
###### - Resolved Issues
- v1.277 breaking change - variables translated as string

#### version 1.0.6 changelog:
###### - DQL by App Team via IAM User Groups
- analysis on the cost and ddu consumption by IAM User Groups (requires an Oauth Client with the following role:account-idm-read)

###### - Added variables
- accountId - used query IAM api to get user groups/members

#### version 1.0.5 changelog:
###### - AVG Cost & DDU per Execution (Optimization Opportunity) to DQL by User Analysis
- analysis on the cost and ddu consumption on average per execution

###### - Added variables
- costAvgExecutionAlert - used to set the condition of the cost for average execution
- limit - used to set the limit of results

#### version 1.0.4 changelog:
###### - Added DDU by Bucket
- ddu and cost analysis of DQL usage where the source resides in a bucket
###### - UX clean up
- made sure the order of costalert/cost/ddu was consistent

#### version 1.0.3 changelog:
###### - Added variables
- startTime variable - used in the dql by app team, start time of query.
- endTime variable - used in the dql by app team, end time of query.
- timeZone variable - used in the dql by app team, time zone of query.
###### - DQL by App Team
- visualizes the ddu and cost breakdown by user defined app team.
- user can define the team to users in the javascript of the tile.

#### version 1.0.2 changelog:
###### - Added variables
- costAlert variable - defines a cost per user, and sets a ⚠, if above.
- decimalPlace variable - sets decimal places
- currency variable - sets currency
###### - Conditions for costAlert per user:
- visualizes the a user defined cost alert. If above costAlert = "⚠️", else = "✅"

#### version 1.0.1 changelog:
###### - Added following conditions to un-optimized query:
- OR contains(query_string, "samplingRatio")
- OR contains(query_string, "experimentalFieldsSummary")
- OR contains(query_string, "limit")

61.title: Last 24h
61.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and matchesPhrase(event.type, "Query")
AND isNotNull(user.email)
AND in(event.type,$DataType)
and in(user.email,$user)
| fields query_start, event.type, query_id, user.email, billed_bytes, timestamp
| makeTimeseries daily=sum(billed_bytes/1024/1024/1024), interval:1d
| fieldsAdd yesterday = arrayLast(daily)

62.title: DQL Cost
62.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and matchesPhrase(event.type, "Query")
AND isNotNull(user.email)
AND in(event.type,$DataType)
and in(user.email,$user)
| fields query_start, event.type, query_id, user.email, billed_bytes, timestamp
| fieldsAdd query_cost = billed_bytes/1024/1024/1024*toDouble($cost)
| makeTimeseries cost = sum(query_cost)
| fieldsAdd totalCost = round(arraySum(cost),decimals:toLong($decimalPlace))
